features: Jacques Bogart Bogart pour homme edt spray individually
description: Product description Discover the refined fragrance of Jacques Bogart with this Eau de Toilette for men. This 100ml bottle offers a long-lasting fragrance and is ideal for travel thanks to its travel size. It is a liquid perfume with a fragrance concentration of Eau de Toilette, specially designed for men. Feel mature and confident with this fragrance, which accompanies your whole day. Ingredients perfume Directions [Use as a personal fragrance: Spray on pulse points such as wrist, neck, and inner elbows] See more
